name: International Cement Group Ltd.
summary: International Cement Group Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, primarily engages in the production, sale, and distribution of cement in Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, Tajikistan, Afghanistan, Uzbekistan, and internationally. It is also involved in the manufacture and marketing of aluminum extrusions, aluminum panels, and associated architectural aluminum products used for the construction industry. In addition, the company undertakes aluminum architectural contracts; engineering works; and building construction subcontracting projects. Further, it develops prototype equipment for generation of electricity through recycling of shredded tires. The company is based in Singapore. International Cement Group Ltd. is a subsidiary of Victory Gate Ventures Limited.
